name: Agent Honeydew
description:
Agent Honeydew is Monkey's sidekick and friend, who can ask Monkey for help with her telepathic abilities.

This character will be an open prompt. I dont have any ideas as to what do do with her. Be evil, be good, be Monkey. Go Banana's (Get it? Banana's because...monkey and....yeah I'll stop.)
